title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations · State Clinic: External State Waits
summary: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops external state waits increment in a durable runbook and restartable workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
